case_title: RESLEURE, NILO VS EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESLEURE, NILO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS. JUDGMENT VACATED NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26464 ON 1-18-01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESLEURE, NILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS. $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,420.00, JUDGMENT REPRESENTS REFUND OF PLFT'S $1700 SECURIT DEPOSIT, REDUCED BY CREDIT OF $300 PREVIOUSLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESLEURE, NILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS. $213.24 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $233.24, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26464 ON 8-7-01 (MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND DEFENDANT'S POST-JUDGMENT REQUESTS FILED IN SUP. COURT ARE DENIED BY PROTEM MARK DIVELBISS.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-08-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-03-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26464, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,212.91 FILED BY RESLEURE, NILO AS TO DEFENDANT EPIS, BARBRA IND.& DBA LINDEN ARMS APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NILO RESLEURE FILE BY PLAINTIFF.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED TO COURT BY DEFT STATING THAT PLTF HAS BEEN PAID BY MONEY ORDER.
